review_title: Very good solution to spam contact form submissions
author: Chris F.
pros: I run WP websites with contact us forms. I was getting hundreds of spam contact form submissions. I looked around for a solution. I tried to fix the contact form 7 plugin with security features. The spammers defeated everything. I came across WP Cerber and tried it. It has a submission form checker. So far it has stopped all the spammers, but the real customers get through.
cons: It can occasionally block users of the website who we desire, so false positives.

review_title: An excellent security plugin
description: Extremely important to use a security plugin since Wordpress is very popular and consequently is the target of attacks and invasion attempts. The most complete version has many useful and interesting functions that greatly increase the level of protection. Super recommended.
author: Sidnei E.
pros: Cerber Security in its Free version brings numerous features. Login attempts are logged and blocked; The Control Panel has very separate and clear tabs. Legacy mode is useful for loading before other components used on the site. Blocking uploads of PHP files is particularly useful on sites that share files in PDF or .jPG format submitted by users via forms.
cons: I would like a less monochrome and more youthful graphical interface.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: WP Cerber for the uninitiated
description: I outsourced the build of my Amazon Affiliates website in Wordpress and took delivery of a live site which had basic security. Enhancing the security was my first priority. Although I have an IT background I am a raw beginner with managing my own website. I noted that I had free WP Cerber and looking at this I decided to try the free trial of Professional right away. I worked through the guidance provided in the Getting Started pages with great care. Disaster. I was locked out of my WP admin site and my website broke completely. I then spent the next two days working through multiple blogs to resolve the issues. The WP Cerber Reset file didn’t work and ultimately I had to uninstall all plugins completely via my host site files and rebuild bit by bit. I still don’t really know what the problem was although I suspect a conflict between plugins. I reinstalled WP Cerber because notwithstanding my experience I am nervous about security and wanted to resolve everything and understand the impacts of the changes that were being recommended. I still considering implementing the pro version so that I can sleep at night knowing that someone is out there defending my website from attack.
author: Elaine V.
pros: I gain great satisfaction from seeing lists of suspicious activity being blocked and denied including locking out of subnets of suspicious actors. I appreciated all of the options available to tighten security and the guidance provided by the website on how to implement it.
cons: Despite the guidance I experienced issues with implementation of the Free Pro version. For the neophyte it is a minefield to work out what to implement and what to avoid since the impacts are not fully understood.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: My 3 years use experience
description: I have been using the WP Server Security plugin since 2019 February as the primary security and security related control tool for my blog site. It has extraordinary features to monitor, configure and the tools to prevent almost all nasty attacks on the site. It is unbelievable how many attacks are coming to a site on the public internet. Attacks are mostly coming to take control of your site in a way to upload vulnerable codes into the site and run them. Apparently there are some common codes hidden in some old version plugins which attackers are probing them continuously. It is also the usual attack type to get your login screen and try to log into your site as the administrator. Creating spam comments looks the most simple malicious action among others. Keep in mind that all these attacks are coming from automated tools and repeating thousands times. WP Cerber Security has all the required precautions to prevent them. It has facilities to hide your login screen, identify attacks and stops them repeating, gives you control which require in various levels of expertise to configure your site to minimize attack attempts among all other useful and effective abilities.
author: Ismail C.
pros: It is an easy one stop tool to have a secure site
cons: This is a comprehensive software gives you control of your site which require in various levels of expertise to configure your site.

review_title: One of the best security plugins for Wordpress
description: Even the free version gives you enough insights to understand how important it is to secure the own Wordpress installation. I have a lot of actions blocked and this makes me feel much better every day working on my site. I use the Genesis framework along with Imagely Themes and all my plugins work seamlessly together, WP Cerber perfectly fits in without giving me any annoying moments of instabilities etc.
author: Ananda P.
pros: The installation was quick and without any issues, as it should be. Afterwards you familiarize yourself with a well structured "Getting started Guide" and more information right at hand. The information provided makes all the available security measures accessible even for non-techie people. After I spent ~20 minutes everything was setup properly and is protecting my site flawlessly. Changed login URL and few other "standards" hardened my Wordpress site effectively.
cons: The advertising on the right always attracts my eyes and the German translation is sometimes bit strange. Other than that it does what it should, keeps my site up and secure. I would expect bit more explaining information about the Anti-Spam Protection options as this doesn't become really clear what if and how. Up until now I didn't get any spam comments with the free version but maybe this changes with more traffic.

review_title: Simple yet effective.
description: Simple and elegant at what it does the ability to ignore a vital part of any websites security knowing that your safe and simply a click away from real time updates on a number of issues makes Cerber a valuable asset in any defence.
author: scott N.
pros: From locking out annoying automated bots from trying to get access to your backend to simply one click hardening and the never ending list of secure options to select from Cerber for us is a simple yet intuitive addon that we never knew we needed, it's seamless integration with a number of our websites and simply being able to launch and forget knowing that everything is continuously running as you left it, its now in the top 5 of all programs that we will add to any future and current ongoing WordPress structured websites we launch.
cons: The simplicity of the software made is simply over look the need to turn off the constant reminders on however many lockouts were happening, even our dedicated security mailbox couldn't handle the sheer influx of emails that were being sent out - thankfully a couple of check boxes later and this was resolved took us a while to get there however.

review_title: We are non-technical
description: Perfectly satisfied and looking forward to months of peace of mind especially as I am non-technical.
author: David D.
pros: About three months ago, I had the unfortunate experience of having our site attacked by hackers who left the main files inundated with a virus and the site taken down by our hosting company. I turned to them for help, but they could only refer me to a third party who would charge a great deal. We are a small association of non-technical professionals who pay an annual fee for the site's upkeep and other administration. Not enough in the bank to pay out for exorbitant prices. I looked at various solutions that would clean the area. Amongst the solutions looked at was WP Cerber Security. Attracted by their website information and offer of a free version that appeared to provide more than most of their competitors was an easy alternative for me. I ran the scan and followed the outcome to clean the files that had become compromised. I have continued to leave the free plugin active and checked almost daily to see how it prevented further malicious activity. I am so impressed with the software that today; I have recommended our members convert the free version to the pro version for peace of mind and security. It is a no-brainer, and I can safely recommend its use to anyone searching for a solution.
cons: The scan takes a long time to complete this is not a negative but can be a bit frustrating when one is busy. Also if you try to add a site to the safe listing it can be a bit confusing to carry it out correctly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: WP Cerber, Just What I Needed
description: I have done a lot of research and tested several different plugins over the past few months. Of those, the plugins are either too simple and didn't offer the options I wanted or were too difficult to understand. I can't afford to spend a couple of days trying to learn and implement a plugin. WP Cerber falls right in the middle for me. It is simple enough to set up quickly but advanced enough to offer all the options I like to have at my disposal. I have now transferred all of my client's sites and my own over to WP Cerber.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: WP Cerber is loaded with options making it easy to secure your/client sites from the majority of attacks. The UI and instructions are simple to understand, making implementation quick and painless. The advanced menus and options allow you to increase your site's security as you better understand what you need.
cons: There have been a couple of instances where it has blocked me from accessing or doing something that I should have been. However, this was my fault, and I was still learning the plugin's ins and outs.

review_title: My line of defense for Worpress
description: I researched many security solutions for wordpress, some big and fancy, some look fantastic but unknown and I chose one that was simple to use and has proven, day after day to be my line of defence. WP Cerber Security does its job well, produces reports and defends your site (lots of hard work) from malicious software's and the general sniffer on the web. (full of them). I was so glad to come back from a weekend off and see that my site had been protected by WP Cerber from illegal hackers and stopped a possible intrusion by blocking the intruders IP sub-domain from accessing the site, its a smart software. By detecting suspicious behaviour it analyses the level of threat and takes action. I am a happy customer and do recommend WP Cerber to all worpress administrators, the paid version and the free version are great, but the paid version maintains all the updates, servers and programming to keep them at the top of their game so if you are pro go paid.
author: Robert C.
pros: Security on the web is a must and there is absolutely no way around that. Working with wordpress is great, all the plug-ins, builders and a fantastic community of great people, but there is always the other side, with popularity comes illegal hacking. We work with a php based system and it has its vulnerabilities, some known and easy to solve some still not known and there you can get into in deep trouble, CW Cerber is simple to use and to get familiar with, it helps you with many options and possibilities.
cons: Up to now, all working well. Maybe a tutorial on their site is a good idea, many people don´t have a tech background so having small, to the point, videos is important.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: What i think of WP Cerber Security
description: So far, using WP Cerber Security has been a fantastic experience for me. I have had little or no issues with it. Its security features are very standard and should be able to hold of basic to sophisticated wordpress attacks.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: WP Cerber Security comes with a good anti spam, and anti ddos feature. It also comes with a sophisticated malware scanner and a 2factor authenticator to prevent hackers from gaining access into your website.
cons: WP Cerber Security team could make its UI much better. Sometimes i get lost in the crowd of buttons to click, aside from that WP Cerber Security works pretty well
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Only Security Plugin I Will Use for My Website
description: Compare to other security plugins I used before, and this is the most simple, lightweight, and most of all, compelling of them all. The free version itself is pretty solid to be free. But if you need extra protection, the cost won't hurt the bank. I'm handling multiple websites of clients and my site, and to tell you honestly, all plugins I tried can't prevent the malware to entire my sites. But when I used Cerber Security, It helps me sleep without thinking that my site might get hack or get infected by malware. I will always use Cerber Security to all my projects. I hope you will too!
author: John D.
pros: You can easily install it without issue Lightweight yet effective It blocks hundreds of Suspicious activity on a free version.
cons: I really hope they increase the license from 5 to 10 :)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Logiciel très performant, cependant la prise en main demande du temps
description: Rassurer les membres de notrevassociation que leurs données sont sécurisées
author: BENJAMIN O.
pros: Possibilité de recevoir aussitôt des mails d'alertes
cons: le rappel incessant invitant à passer à la version premium

review_title: Free Version Very Helpful and Informative
description: The website has been experiencing odd behavior such as the occasional error that prevents the site from loading, and slow load performance. WP Cerber Security has identified many problems. I'm hoping that paying for the pro version will help to correct the problems the site is having.
author: al S.
pros: This software provides great detail in the actions taking place in the site. It monitors usage as well as pointing out malicious lines of code and malware that may be effecting the performance of the site and risks of attack. It has been very helpful in identifying problems.
cons: I'm using the free version, so my con is that I can't see how it will perform in the removal of malicious lines of code and malware.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Efficient plug-in
author: Elodie C.
pros: Cerber is a powerful and complete plugin
cons: I use cerber to secure my sites and I have never had any security concerns or attacks since I upgraded to the pro version
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The online toon needed for security
author: Nora P.
pros: Changung the default wp login and ip blacklist
cons: I cant say i have somnethibg I like least
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Easy to use
author: Vanessa A.
pros: I like that WP Cerber security offers a free plugin. The free option allows you to scan your site weekly. The plugin also notifies you of possible attacks. It offers a number of helpful features such as whitelist and blacklisting IP's. You can also see details of the IP's as well.
cons: The quick scan can be a bit confusing or offer limited features. Some settings may be a bit confusing to new users if you aren't very tech savy.

review_title: WP Cerber Security
author: Brandi A.
pros: What I liked most were the login limits and notifications and the vulnerability scanning.
cons: The cost is what I liked least about WP Cerber Security.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: WP Cerber Security is my favorite Wordpress security plugin
description: In my opinion, WP Cerber Security is a very useful and easy to use plugin compared with others. And even the free version do a lot more than other Wordpress security plugin. If spending some money buying this great plugin can make you feel safe and comfortable on your website, why not doing it?
author: Nick S.
pros: WP Cerber Security gives you the ability to check users login status and most importantly block IP that constantly probing for vulnerable code and give out malicious request, this actually helps a lot because you definitely don't want someone access their backdoor and sneak into your website and you didn't even know it! Once you find out which IP is doing these, you can simply clicking one button and add those IPs into black list, it's so easy and useful. Really great plugin.
cons: The setting is a little complicated since there are so many options to deal with. You definitely have to spend some time on it. But luckily, WP Cerber Security make great documents and show you how to configure step by step.

review_title: I have been using Gerber for a couple of months
description: I installed Gerber on a website a couple of months ago when I started having trouble with attempted log ins and attempted malicious codes. I had used Wordfence a couple of years ago but had to uninstall it because of some problems including being locked out even though I was whitelisted. I am very happy with Gerber Security. It is easy to use and I love the features. I mainly use the activity and blacklisting IPs. Following activity has helped me with adding more security features and blacklisting IPs (500 so far) has kept the bad guys at bay. The malicious attempts that usually had been over 200 per day have slowed to 5-10 per day and I am seriously looking at upgrading my Gerber as i want to block countries now. Thank you Gerber you have given me peace and website security!
author: Lois M.
pros: Very intuitive and easy to use. Has all the features I want. I love that it made it easy to create an alternative log in page and block the original. I love that it is easy to follow the activity to see what the bad guys are trying to do and easy to blacklist them. Also it was easy to set up parameters like how many log in attempts, in what time frame, and when locked out.
cons: I haven't found any. Oh yeah, I didn't use some of the features because I did not understand what they would do so maybe some laymen explanations would help.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Does a great job stopping hacking
author: Curtis A.
pros: I love the ability to move wp-contents, block wp-admin.php, wp-login.php and setup customization for all of that.
cons: The vulnerability scan seems to pop many false positives but it has identified files that are not supposed to be present.

review_title: Keeping my client websites secure!
description: I've been using this on several sites over the past year or too after trying several other plugins that end up being bloatware. I find that Cerber is extremely fast and easy to use.
author: Simon D.
pros: Cerber is a fantastic piece of security software, one of the best features is that it doesn't slow down your site, or is super intrusive like many other packages for Wordpress.
cons: Maybe it could have improved updates on malware and known intrusive IPs. Also, moving the site admin interferes if an external client asks for their data to be removed, the email sent back to them doesn't take into consideration the admin page login move. Would be fantastic to see a Credit Card fraud integration.

review_title: website security
author: Larry T.
pros: I switched over from Big Commerce and I didn't need to worry about website security. The plans were getting too expensive so I decided to use WooCommerce. However, my website is under constant attack. Recently, a bot was able to find vulnerabilities with my website and started to created hundreds of fake orders. I used Cerber Security to blacklist the IP address where the attack originated. The fake orders stopped. Cerber was able to help protect my site. Cerber also provides helpful features.
cons: The annual fee of $99. $49 per year would be a reasonable price.

review_title: WP Cerber Security gives me peace of mind
description: We have tried multiple other security solutions, but in terms of causing unintended issues WP Cerber is the best!
author: Chris H.
pros: Using WP Cerber helps to protect my website against bad actors accessing my site. The free version is great and protects from DDOS attacks and locks out many threats, all of the critical threats are at bay using WP Cerber. When using the Paid version it gives access to the additional security we need on our website. It stops bots from signing up and taking action which was a real issue before using this software.
cons: Sometimes I get a little bit lost when using the dashboard and adding IP addresses to the whitelist, but the functionality is there! Its a me problem

review_title: Not only do you feel safe, be it
description: The use (for the gigantic functionality) is absolutely resource-saving. As admin you get the right answers quickly on the homepage. As a user you don't notice anything. The performance does not go down excessive.
author: Horst V.
pros: The possibilities to adjust the security settings to your own needs are so extensive that you can restrict and open almost everything as you need it. An example: If you are only active in certain countries, all others can easily be deactivated. This ensures that you only receive leads from the target region and keeps all attacks from other regions away.
cons: Not all texts have been translated. The headlines are, the explanations are not - it should be the other way around.

review_title: WP Cerber Security review
author: wendy S.
pros: This Security is top notch. I found it much easier than I had thought to use. As a beginner I was concerned that I would not be able to learn to use this product, but I found the information on their website very helpful if I had questions or needed more information to understand something. It functions like it claims and although I have not used it long I have had no issues and I am pleased with the product.
cons: I do not really have any thing I do not like about this security product, I have had to look up a few terms as I am a beginner. The only thing I would suggest is to have a bit more details for beginners. But this would not be something that would deter me from recommending this to another beginner.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
